description_long: This is a large, multifunctional office fax machine with a robust rectangular body, primarily colored in shades of gray and blue. The top section features a sloped document feeder and a prominent control panel mounted on an arm, which includes a display screen and several buttons. The front of the machine has multiple paper drawers and a visible output tray extending from the side, designed to catch printed or faxed documents. The rear and sides are more utilitarian, with vents and access panels, while the overall build suggests a heavy-duty, commercial-grade appliance. The machine stands on a broad base, likely housing additional paper storage or internal components. No visible telephone handset is attached, and the design emphasizes functionality and durability for high-volume urban office environments.
description: A large, commercial-grade fax machine with a blue-gray body, prominent control panel, and multiple paper trays. Designed for heavy office use, it features a side output tray and robust construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the control panel on an arm, the sloped document feeder, and the extended output tray.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the paper drawers, main access panel, and the top document feeder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the control panel arm visible and the output tray extending from the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel, vents, and the top document feeder's rear edge.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is mounted on an articulated arm extending from the upper left side, featuring a rectangular display screen at the top and a cluster of buttons below. The controls are grouped together for easy access, with indicator lights adjacent to the buttons. The layout is compact and slightly angled toward the user.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is located at the lower front and side of the machine, with multiple stacked drawers for high capacity. The trays are horizontally oriented and feature visible handles for pulling out, with no adjustable guides or covers apparent.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned on the right side of the main body, with an angled tray extending outward to catch printed or faxed documents.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the machine in any of the views.
